tx_comptroller_property_tax.title: Property Tax Information
tx_comptroller_property_tax.notes: County and local property tax rates and data.

tx_comptroller_tax_rates_levies.title: Tax Rates and Levies (county & city workbooks)
tx_comptroller_tax_rates_levies.notes: Published total tax rate ($ / $100 taxable value) for the county or city taxing unit per year. Same numeric value as percent of taxable value for that unit only—not combined overlapping jurisdictions.

us_census_acs_b25103.title: ACS 5-year Table B25103 — Median Real Estate Taxes Paid
us_census_acs_b25103.notes: B25103_001E = Median real estate taxes paid (dollars) for all owner-occupied units. Covers combined bill across county, city, school district, and special districts net of homestead exemptions.
